resources.string: Octi can\'t connect to Google Play. Is Google Play installed and up to date? Is your Google Account logged in? Try clearing the cache of the Google Play app and rebooting your device.
No purchases found. Are you using the right account?
Google Play reports that you already own this upgrade. Use \'Restore purchase\' to unlock it.
Upgrade to unlock additional features and support development!

plurals.name: upgrades_dashcard_device_limit_hint
plurals.item: The free version is limited to %1$d device.
The free version is limited to %1$d devices.

resources.string: Octi has no ads and doesn\'t sell user data. My work is financed by you ❤️.

• More than 3 devices 💯
• Different themes 🎨
• More options ⚙️
• Extra sync servers🖥️️
• Continued development ☕
• A motivated developer 🧙
You can choose between a one-time purchase and a cheaper yearly subscription. Both are cancellable at any time.\nSame features, just different pricing models.
The subscription starts with a free 14-day trial, after which you\'ll be charged once per year.
It looks like you upgraded to Pro on this device before. If you still own the upgrade, restoring will unlock it again.
Your upgrade is valid across devices on the same Google account.
Play Store synchronization may take time. Try rebooting, clearing Google Play cache or simply wait.
Multiple accounts can confuse Google Play. Log out of other accounts or install through the Google Play website, which forces associations with a specific account.
Thanks for supporting Octi! Your Pro features are unlocked.
You own the one-time Pro purchase. It never expires.
Your Pro subscription is active and renews automatically.
Your Pro subscription is active but set to not renew. It stays active until the end of the current period.
You own both the subscription and the one-time purchase. To avoid paying twice, cancel the subscription in Google Play — you keep Pro through the lifetime purchase.
Prefer to pay once instead of subscribing? You can buy the one-time Pro purchase and stop the subscription.

Your subscription still renews automatically. Cancel it in Google Play first, then come back to buy the one-time purchase. Buying it here does not cancel or refund the subscription — use the same Google account.
Your subscription is still set to renew. Cancel it in Google Play first so you are not charged twice, then buy the one-time purchase. This does not refund the subscription.
Google Play didn\'t respond in time, so we can\'t safely confirm your subscription state. Please try again in a moment.
We\'re confirming your purchase with Google Play. Your Pro features stay unlocked in the meantime.
We still can\'t confirm your purchase with Google Play. Your Pro features remain unlocked for now. Try restoring, or contact support if this persists.
You are on the free version
Upgrade to Octi Pro to unlock extra features and support development.
See your Pro status and manage your upgrade
